data.content: Replaced getBackend().update(beatId, { state: rolledBack }) with nextKnot(beatId, repoPath, { actorKind: 'agent' }) in enforceQueueTerminalInvariant (src/lib/terminal-manager.ts). The old code called kno update --status which fails on invalid backward state transitions. The new code calls kno next which knows valid forward transitions. Commit 9f34d5c merged to main as 9005d94. All quality gates pass: 0 lint errors, clean typecheck, 1694 tests passing.
